text.tspan: Hi, I'm Della. I design and build modern web applications that
combine pixel-perfect layouts with solid, functional code.

g.text: Bringing ideas to life using design and code

text.tspan: I bridge the gap between creative visual designs and high-fidelity front-end
implementations. My philosophy centers on simplicity, usability, and joyful colors.
Whether establishing a cohesive brand identity or programming complex dashboard
features, I pay close attention to animations and micro-interactions that make

g.text: Responsible for complex order dashboards and rendering speed optimization.
Designed client experiences in Figma and coded animated landing pages.
Programmed administrative database dashboards and consumer complaints workflows.

text.tspan: Have a project idea, want to collaborate,
or just want to say hello? Fill out the form or
drop me an email. I'd love to hear from you!

g.text: Tell me more about your project goals...
